name: Podmore
tagline: Sophisticated British gastropub by the Senia team — emerald booths, $30 cocktails, and everything made from scratch.
mustOrder: fish and chips — elevated but still recognizable
parking: Street parking on Merchant St; downtown parking garages
talkStory: Opened in 2022 by Chef Anthony Rush, Katherine Nomura, and the Senia team as a British gastropub concept — named after a street in London. The emerald-green booths and brass fixtures evoke a Mayfair lounge. Fish and chips uses local catch battered in Kona Brewing ale; the pot pie has a from-scratch puff pastry lid. Cocktails run $25-30 and are meticulously crafted. A completely unique concept for Honolulu — nobody else is doing elevated British food in Hawaii. Same hospitality DNA as Senia next door.
